title: Grain-sorghum agronomy: optimum plant population for yield testing
abstract: Slnce the grain-grass plant type is substantially diifferent from normal sorghum grown almost everywhere, there is great need to have more information on all agronomic aspects.  Bccause of their early maturity tillering habit and narrow leaves, population, density trial was conducted in order to recommend the optimum population for qrain yield testing of promising breeding material
